markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance, provide feedback, and align on new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Refined:** The "Zero Eyes vs. Us" article is the new standard for competitive content, praised for its clear positioning and side-by-side table. Future articles must integrate product mentions more authentically, connecting solutions to problems rather than using datasheet-style blurbs.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:** A new internal OKR sets a minimum target of 3 articles/week (vs. the 5/week contract) to ensure consistent output. The team will also track traditional SEO (keywords, ranking) and AI mentions to demonstrate progress against competitors like Zero Eyes.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [**New Initiative Approved:** A gated "Agentic Physical Security Playbook" (5k words) was approved. It will be a human-driven project, not AI-generated, to ensure high quality and strategic alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Feedback

  - [**High-Performing Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
      - [**"Zero Eyes vs. Us":** Praised by E-staff for its clear positioning and side-by-side table. This article is the new benchmark for competitive content.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
      - [**"Top 10 Technologies in Healthcare":** Also well-received.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [**Articles Needing Revision:**](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
      - [**"School Safety Statistics":**](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
          - [**Problem:** Disjointed narrative, unfocused intro, and a product section that felt like a datasheet blurb.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
          - [**Solution:** Product mentions must be integrated authentically, connecting solutions to specific problems. The level of product focus should vary by article type (e.g., educational vs. product-focused).](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [**Access Intelligence Article:**](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
          - [**Problem:** Continued confusion in positioning between threat detection and access control.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)

### Performance Metrics & Goals

  - [**Engage Sessions:** Grew for the fourth consecutive week (+8.33% WoW).](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [**AI Monitoring:** Saw a modest uptick in mentions across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Including the brand in content helps connect topics to Ambient, which boosts AI mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [**SEO Tracking:** The team tracks keyword growth via SEMrush. More articles will naturally improve keyword ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [**Q4 OKRs:**](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
      - [**Production:** 3 articles/week minimum (vs. 5/week contract).](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
      - [**Reporting:** A QBR at quarter-end will show progress on keywords, ranking, and AI mentions relative to competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)

### New Initiative: Agentic Physical Security Playbook

  - [**Concept:** A gated, human-driven "playbook" (5k words) for decision-makers on implementing agentic AI in physical security.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [**Goal:** Serve professionals exploring implementation but not yet ready for a demo.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [**Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
      - [Problem statement & technology overview.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
      - [Implementation stages (using an existing image).](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
      - [The four pillars of agentic AI.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
      - [ROI examples from Ambient's business value assessments.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [An "agentic response" section (to be added by Atul).](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [A maturity model image (to be created).](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
      - [A final CTA landing page.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Must be completed quickly, balancing speed with quality.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Fuji:**](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
      - [Finish reviewing "Machine learning and security systems."](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
      - [Provide ROI examples from business value assessments for the playbook.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
      - [Share the new Pulsar messaging document and recordings.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [**GrowthX Labs:**](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
      - [Revise the "School Safety Statistics" article per feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
      - [Begin drafting the "Agentic Physical Security Playbook."](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [Prioritize approval of 20 pending content ideas to maintain production momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [**GrowthX.ai:**](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
      - [Schedule a Q4 Business Review (QBR) for the end of the quarter.](https://fathom.video/share/Rno9S5LS3BV9dpze6GhCSs98vFXSVxKh?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
